productDisplayName: Fila Men's Striper Pique Polo Purple Navy T-shirt
description: CompositionPurple pique polo neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, with broad and narrow stripes in black, a ribbed collar in black, front buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, embroidered branding on left chest and a vented hem with brand badge on the leftFitRegularWash care Machine wash cold Warm iron Do not tumble dry Do not bleach Wash dark colours separately Dry in shade Do not iron on print A great casual wear, this polo neck t-shirt from fila is designed for those who are young at heart. Created using a cotton and polyester blend fabric, this tee is designed to keep you fresh and comfortable all day, while the ribbed sleeve hem sits snug on well-toned arms. Team this T-shirt with jeans, stylishly buckled belts and sports shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
